content: We can frame the core Self-Refine iterative self-improvement framework as the structural backbone for LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where multiple inconsistent reflection perspectives from self-reflection research are injected into each Self-Refine iteration to break the blind spot of single-perspective self-feedback. This creates a new zero-shot self-refinement framework that requires no additional training, supervision, or external resources, while addressing the common limitation that single-perspective self-feedback often overlooks flaws in the model's own initial output.
